title: Thermal Cross-Interference in a Data-Center Cooling Schedule
strategies: concentrated coolant block (trivial baseline: high peak self-interference)
coarse triangular / ramp profiles (mild spreading, beats the block)
flat/uniform profile (c1 = 2, a strong simple reference)
simulated-annealing / coordinate-descent shape search seeded from the flat profile to push the autocorrelation peak below 2
